name: qmd
description: [yotamleo fork of tobi/qmd] Local markdown search plugin re-pointed at a SHARED HTTP MCP daemon (http://localhost:8181/mcp) instead of a per-session stdio server, so every Claude session addresses ONE qmd index runtime instead of loading its own copy (HIMMEL-592). Skill name (qmd:qmd) and MCP tool prefix (mcp__plugin_qmd_qmd__*) are unchanged from upstream. See marketplace/plugins/qmd/README.md for the fork delta.
